$description: Figma-binding radius scale (figma-parity-reconciliation ADR; research F1). The binding Figma scale is xs4/sm5/md7/lg10/pill18, replacing the prior sm4/md6/lg10/xl14 scale; pill18 is new (the prior code used native rounded-full, which the W02/W03 rewrite re-keys to pill18). Emits as --radius-fg-* CSS custom properties via the non-color token pipeline; the legacy --radius-vs-* names remain as deprecated aliases until the view rewrite cuts usages over (W04 removes them).

xs.$description: Tightest corner; binding Figma 4px (chips, small controls).

pill.$description: Pill/fully-rounded corner; binding Figma 18px, replacing native rounded-full for the bound pill shapes.
